description: MALDI Imaging MS data collected from the right kidney of a 51 year old White  donor by theBiomolecular Multimodal Imaging Center (BIOMC) at Vanderbilt University. BIOMIC is a Tissue Mapping Center that is part of the NIH funded Human Biomolecular Atlas Program (HuBMAP). Mass Spectrometry images of lipids were collected with a Bruker Daltonics MALDI timsTOF fleX at10.000000 micron from m/z 100.000000-2000.000000 in negative ion mode. Support was provided by the NIH Common Fund and National Institute of Diabetes and Digestive and Kidney Diseases (U54 DK120058). Tissue was collected through the Cooperative Human Tissue Network with support provided by the NIH National Cancer Institute (5 UM1 CA183727-08).
